creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
buildworld fails:

===> lib/ncurses/ncurses (obj,all,install)
LC_ALL=C sh /poudriere/data/src-PR258707/contrib/ncurses/ncurses/base/MKlib_gen.sh "cpp -target x86_64-unknown-freebsd14.0 --sysroot=/usr/obj/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/amd64.amd64/tmp -B/usr/obj/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/amd64.amd64/tmp/usr/bin -O2 -pipe -fno-common   -D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED -I. -I/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/lib/ncurses/tinfo -I/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/lib/ncurses/ncurses -I/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/contrib/ncurses/include -I/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/contrib/ncurses/ncurses -I/usr/obj/poudriere/data/src-PR258707/amd64.amd64/lib/ncurses/tinfo/ -Wall -DNDEBUG -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -g -gz=zlib  -std=gnu99 -Wno-format-zero-length -fstack-protector-strong -Wsystem-headers -Werror -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-pointer-sign -Wno-empty-body -Wno-string-plus-int -Wno-unused-const-variable -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-unused-value -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-unused-function -Wno-enum-conversion -Wno-unused-local-typedef -Wno-address-of-packed-member  -Qunused-arguments   "  "awk" generated < curses.h >lib_gen.c
/bin/sh: cannot open curses.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2
